articles.title: Beyond The Scoreline: The Possession Trap
articles.subtitle: Messi scored the goals. But Argentina won this match with the ball at their feet for barely forty minutes — and a plan for the other fifty.
articles.author: Debapam Ghosh

articles.title: Beyond The Scoreline: Balance in Chaos
articles.subtitle: Brazil and Morocco showed us that draws can be as tactical as they are tense. When neither team blinks, the scoreline tells half the story.
articles.author: Debapam Ghosh
